stages.concept:
# Unit 071: to부정사의 시제와 수동태 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **to부정사의 시제와 수동태**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **단순 부정사** (to + 동사원형) — 주절 동사와 같은 시제이거나 미래의 일

> He seems **to be** happy.
> 그는 행복한 것 같다. (현재)

> I hope **to visit** Paris someday.
> 나는 언젠가 파리를 방문하기를 원한다. (미래)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **완료 부정사** (to have + p.p.) — 주절 동사보다 **이전** 시제

> He seems **to have been** sick yesterday.
> 그는 어제 아팠던 것 같다.

> She is said **to have lived** in London.
> 그녀는 런던에 살았었다고 한다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"He seems (       ) sick yesterday." (그는 어제 아팠던 것 같다.)
1. to be
2. to have been ✅
3. being

👩‍🏫 선생님: 문장의 동사(seems)는 현재지만, 아팠던 건 어제(yesterday)이므로 주절보다 이전 시제를 나타내는 '완료 부정사(to have p.p.)'를 써야 한답니다!

👩‍🏫 선생님: **수동태 부정사** (to be + p.p.) — ~되는 것

> The work needs **to be done** by tomorrow.
> 그 일은 내일까지 끝내져야 한다.

> He wants **to be loved** by everyone.
> 그는 모든 사람에게 사랑받기를 원한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **완료 수동태 부정사** (to have been + p.p.) — ~되었던 것

> The building is said **to have been built** 100 years ago.
> 그 건물은 100년 전에 지어졌다고 한다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 단순(to do), 완료(to have done), 수동(to be done), 완료수동(to have been done)! 4가지 형태를 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 071: to부정사의 시제와 수동태 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
It seems that he is a middle school teacher.
→ He seems (     ) a middle school teacher.
> **정답** to be

---

**02.** It seems that she was sick yesterday.
→ She seems (     ) sick yesterday.
> **정답** to have been

---

**03.** I want to be praised by the teacher.
밑줄 친 부분의 형태는?
> **정답** to부정사의 수동태

---

**04.** He seems ? known the answer before.
> **정답** to have

---

**05.** She wants ? invited to the party.
> **정답** to be

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She seems to been happy yesterday.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to been → to have been

---

**07.** He wants to praised by the teacher.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to praised → to be praised

---

**08.** They seem to have be friends before.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** be → been

---

**09.** She wants to being loved by everyone.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** being → be

---

**10.** He appears to has finished the project.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** has → have

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 아픈 것 같다.
He seems sick.
> **정답** to be

---

**12.** 그녀는 그 전에 그를 만났던 것 같다.
She seems him before.
> **정답** to have met

---

**13.** 나는 선생님에게 칭찬받고 싶다.
I want by the teacher.
> **정답** to be praised

---

**14.** 그는 어제 바빴던 것 같다.
He seems busy yesterday.
> **정답** to have been

---

**15.** 그녀는 모두에게 사랑받기를 원한다.
She wants by everyone.
> **정답** to be loved

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 행복한 것 같다.
He to seems happy be
> **정답** He / seems / to / be / happy

---

**17.** 그녀는 이전에 여기에 왔던 것 같다.
She seems to been here have before
> **정답** She / seems / to / have / been / here / before

---

**18.** 나는 존경받고 싶다.
want I to respected be
> **정답** I / want / to / be / respected

---

**19.** 그는 어제 피곤했던 것 같다.
appears He to have tired been yesterday
> **정답** He / appears / to / have / been / tired / yesterday

---

**20.** 그 책은 많은 사람들에게 읽히기를 원한다.
The book wants to read by be many people
> **정답** The / book / wants / to / be / read / by / many / people
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 071: to부정사의 시제와 수동태 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy seemed to have ______________ very
angry with him.
I hope his apology to be _______________ by her.
been - accept
was - accept
been - accepted
be - accepted
> **정답** been - accepted

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I expect to ______________ to the party.
She seems to ______________ nice to me.
have invited - be
be inviting - have been
invite - be
be invited - have been
> **정답** be invited - have been

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy looks sad to __________________ alone again.
Because she appears to ______________ lonely in the
past.
leave - has been
be left - be
be left - have been
left - has been
> **정답** be left - have been

---

**04.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I expected the book to be written in English.
Amy seems to have been happy now.
My dad wanted the house to be painted white.
Tom and Amy seemed to be married.
> **정답** Amy seems to have been happy now.

---

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The meeting was to be led by any managers
this time.
The party is to be held on 12th March.
Tom seems to be chosen as a main charcter.
Bad memories seem to be forgetting faster.
> **정답** Bad memories seem to be forgetting faster.

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
It seems that this pizza was made by my dad.
This pizza seems to have been made by my
dad.
This pizza seems to be made by my dad.
This pizza seems to made by my dad.
This pizza seems to have made by my dad.
> **정답** This pizza seems to have been made by my dad.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
I was pleased that I was allowed to play computer
games.
I was pleased to have allowed to play
computer games.
I was pleased to allow to play computer
games.
I was pleased to have been allowed to play
computer games.
I was pleased to be allowed to play computer
games.
> **정답** I was pleased to be allowed to play computer games.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
It seemed that she had three cars.
She seems to have three cars.
She seemed to have three cars.
She seemed to had had three cars.
She seems to had had three cars.
> **정답** She seemed to have three cars.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
They seem to have been happy today.
Tom seems to have been lived in Japan when
she was young.
This product is said to be made in Korea.
I am sorry not to answer your call yesterday.
> **정답** This product is said to be made in Korea.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The teacher wants the students to have been
studied.
I allowed him to eat sweet things only for
today.
My mother wants me to choose as a captain.
Amy wants her voice to hear by everyone.
> **정답** I allowed him to eat sweet things only for today.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 예전에 캐나다에 살았던 것 같다.
She seems to have lived in Canada before.
She seems to live in Canada before.
She seemed to live in Canada before.
She seemed to have lived in Canada before.
> **정답** She seems to have lived in Canada before.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 자신의 실수가 잊혀지길 원했다.
Tom wants his mistake to have forgotten.
Tom wanted his mistake to forget.
Tom wanted his mistake to be forgotten.
Tom wants his mistake to be forgotten.
> **정답** Tom wanted his mistake to be forgotten.

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 개는 벌써 밥을 먹은 것 같았다.
The dog seemed to have already fed.
The dog seems to be fed.
The dog seemed to have already been fed.
The dog seemed to feed.
• feed 밥을 먹이다
> **정답** The dog seemed to have already been fed.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy is believed to have been appeared on
TV.
Amy appears to have been married.
He seems to have been invited to the party
last week.
He is thought to have been rich in the past.
> **정답** Amy is believed to have been appeared on TV.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She was disappointed to be failed the test.
The roof seems to have been repainted.
The book is thought to have been written by a
female author.
I am very glad to be invited.
> **정답** She was disappointed to be failed the test.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is happy to have chosen
as a leader.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** chosen → been chosen

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She doesn 't want to forget
by her friends.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** forget → be forgotten

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom seems to have loved when
he was young.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** loved → been loved

---

**19.** 두 문장의 의미를 같게 할 때 빈 칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오.
It seems that she finished her work an hour ago.
→ ________ seems to _________ her work an hour
ago.
She - have finished
It - have finished
She - had finished
She - finish
> **정답** She - have finished

---

**20.** 두 문장의 의미를 같게 할 때 빈 칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오.
I was sad that I was not selected as the main
character.
→ I was sad _____________________ as the main
character.
not to be selected
not to select
not to have selected
to not be selected
> **정답** not to be selected
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 071 to부정사의 시제와 수동태중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (to 부정사 사용)
노트북은 정오 전에 수리될 예정이다.
힌트 (     ) repair
The laptop is expected  (     )   (     )   (     )  before
noon.
정답 to, be, repaired

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (to 부정사 사용)
그 영화는 곧 개봉될 거라고 알려졌다.
힌트 (     ) release
The movie is known  (     )   (     )   (     )  soon.
정답 to, be, released

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (to 부정사 사용)
전구는 1879년에 발명됐다고 한다. [invent]
The light bulb is said  (     )   (     )   (     )  
in 1879.
정답 to, have, been, invented

---

**04.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 다시 쓰시오.
It seems that she was a dancer.
→ She seems to be a dancer.
정답 She seems to have been a dancer.

---

**05.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 다시 쓰시오.
He seemed to have had trouble writing an essay.
→ It seemed that he had troubled writing an essay.
정답 It seemed that he had had trouble writing an essay.

---

**06.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 모두 찾아 다시 쓰시오.
We want the building to paint gray.
정답 We want the building to be painted gray.

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화를 완성하시오. (to 부정사
사용)
A: Do you want to watch a movie tonight?
B: No, thanks. I have some homework 
  (     )  by tomorrow. [do]
정답 to, be, done

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화를 완성하시오.
A: When is the deadline?
B: It is expected  (     )   (     )   (     )  by
December. [complete]
정답 to, be, completed

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 영작하시오.
그는 모든 사람들에 의해 사랑받는 것처럼 보인다. (seem,
love)
__________________________________ by
everyone.
정답 He seems to be loved (It seems that he is loved)

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 영작하시오.
그 집은 페인트를 칠할 필요가 있다. (need, paint)
The house
____________________________________________.
정답 needs to be painted.

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 071: to부정사의 시제와 수동태 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom seemed to have ______________ very angry with her.
I hope his apology to be _______________ by her.
been - accept was - accept been - accepted be - accepted
> 정답: been - accepted

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I expect to ______________ to the event.
She seems to ______________ nice to me.
have invited - be be inviting - have been invite - be be invited - have been
> 정답: be invited - have been

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Amy looks sad to __________________ alone again.
Because she appears to ______________ lonely in the past.
leave - has been be left - be be left - have been left - has been
> 정답: be left - have been

---

**04.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I expected the report to be written in English.
Amy seems to have been happy now.
My mom wanted the room to be painted blue.
Tom and Amy seemed to be engaged.
> 정답: Amy seems to have been happy now.

---

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The event was to be led by any volunteers this time.
The festival is to be held on 15th May.
Tom seems to be chosen as a main speaker.
Bad habits seem to be forgetting faster.
> 정답: Bad habits seem to be forgetting faster.

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
It seems that this cake was made by my mom.
This cake seems to have been made by my mom.
This cake seems to be made by my mom.
This cake seems to made by my mom.
This cake seems to have made by my mom.
> 정답: This cake seems to have been made by my mom.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
I was pleased that I was allowed to join the school trip.
I was pleased to have allowed to join the school trip.
I was pleased to allow to join the school trip.
I was pleased to have been allowed to join the school trip.
I was pleased to be allowed to join the school trip.
> 정답: I was pleased to be allowed to join the school trip.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
It seemed that she had two bikes.
She seems to have two bikes.
She seemed to have two bikes.
She seemed to had had two bikes.
She seems to had had two bikes.
> 정답: She seemed to have two bikes.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
They seem to have been happy today.
Tom seems to have been lived in England when he was young.
This item is said to be made in Japan.
I am sorry not to answer your message yesterday.
> 정답: This item is said to be made in Japan.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The coach wants the players to have been practiced.
I allowed her to eat sweets only for today.
My dad wants me to choose as a captain.
Amy wants her voice to hear by everyone.
> 정답: I allowed her to eat sweets only for today.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 예전에 호주에 살았던 것 같다.
He seems to have lived in Australia before.
He seems to live in Australia before.
He seemed to live in Australia before.
He seemed to have lived in Australia before.
> 정답: He seems to have lived in Australia before.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 자신의 실수가 잊혀지길 원했다.
Amy wants her mistake to have forgotten.
Amy wanted her mistake to forget.
Amy wanted her mistake to be forgotten.
Amy wants her mistake to be forgotten.
> 정답: Amy wanted her mistake to be forgotten.

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 고양이는 벌써 밥을 먹은 것 같았다.
The cat seemed to have already fed.
The cat seems to be fed.
The cat seemed to have already been fed.
The cat seemed to feed.
> 정답: The cat seemed to have already been fed.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom is believed to have been appeared on TV.
Tom appears to have been married.
He seems to have been invited to the event last week.
He is thought to have been wealthy in the past.
> 정답: Tom is believed to have been appeared on TV.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She was disappointed to be failed the quiz.
The roof seems to have been repaired.
The story is thought to have been written by a famous author.
I am very glad to be invited.
> 정답: She was disappointed to be failed the quiz.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. She  is  happy  to  have  picked as  a  leader. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: picked → been picked

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. He  doesn  't  want  to  forget by  his  classmates. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: forget → be forgotten

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Tom  seems  to  have  liked  when he  was  young. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: liked → been liked

---

**19.** 두 문장의 의미를 같게 할 때 빈 칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
It seems that she finished her project an hour ago. → ________ seems to _________ her project an hour ago.
She - have finished It - have finished She - had finished She - finish
> 정답: She - have finished

---

**20.** 두 문장의 의미를 같게 할 때 빈 칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
I was sad that I was not picked as the team leader.
→ I was sad _____________________ as the team leader.
not to be selected not to select not to have selected to not be selected
> 정답: not to be selected
